originContent: # Kodi SponsorBlock
translatedContent: # Kodi SponsorBlock

originContent: [![GitHub release (latest by date)](https://img.shields.io/github/v/release/siku2/script.service.sponsorblock)](https://github.com/siku2/script.service.sponsorblock/releases/latest)
translatedContent: [![GitHub release (latest by date)](https://img.shields.io/github/v/release/siku2/script.service.sponsorblock)](https://github.com/siku2/script.service.sponsorblock/releases/latest)

originContent: [![gitlocalized](https://gitlocalize.com/repo/4205/whole_project/badge.svg)](https://gitlocalize.com/repo/4205)
translatedContent: [![gitlocalized](https://gitlocalize.com/repo/4205/whole_project/badge.svg)](https://gitlocalize.com/repo/4205)

originContent: This is an **unofficial** port of the [SponsorBlock](https://sponsor.ajay.app/) browser extension.
translatedContent: Esta es una versión **no oficial** de la extensión de navegador [SponsorBlock](https://sponsor.ajay.app/).

originContent: It works as an extension to the [YouTube Plugin](https://github.com/anxdpanic/plugin.video.youtube).
translatedContent: Funciona como una extensión del [plugin de YouTube](https://github.com/anxdpanic/plugin.video.youtube).

originContent: Once installed, the add-on will automatically skip sponsor segments in all YouTube and Invidious videos you watch.
translatedContent: Una vez instalado, el complemento saltará automáticamente los segmentos patrocinados en todos los videos de YouTube e Invidious que veas.

originContent: For a detailed explanation of how SponsorBlock works please visit the [offical website](https://sponsor.ajay.app/).
translatedContent: Para una explicación detallada de cómo funciona SponsorBlock por favor visita el [sitio web oficial](https://sponsor.ajay.app/).

originContent: ## Installation
translatedContent: ## Instalación

originContent: The add-on is available in [siku2's repository](https://siku2.io/kodi-repository).
translatedContent: El complemento está disponible en el [repositorio de siku2](https://siku2.io/kodi-repository).

originContent: 1. Install [siku2's repository](https://siku2.io/kodi-repository/install)
translatedContent: 1. Instala el [repositorio de siku2](https://siku2.io/kodi-repository/install)

originContent: 2. Go to "Add-ons" > "Install from repository" > "siku2's Repository"
translatedContent: 2. Ve a "Complementos" > "Instalar desde repositorio" > "Repositorio de siku2"

originContent: 3. Install "SponsorBlock" under "Services"
translatedContent: 3. Instala "SponsorBlock" en "Servicios"

originContent: Congratulations, you now have SponsorBlock installed.
translatedContent: Felicidades, ahora tienes SponsorBlock instalado.

originContent: ## Configuration
translatedContent: ## Configuración

originContent: Different settings are shown based on your [Settings Level](https://kodi.wiki/view/Settings#Settings_Level).
translatedContent: Diferentes opciones se muestran según tu [Nivel de Configuración](https://kodi.wiki/view/Settings#Settings_Level).

originContent: For instance, you can only change your user id if your settings level is "Advanced" or above.
translatedContent: Por ejemplo, solo puedes cambiar tu id de usuario si tu nivel de configuración es "Avanzado" o superior.

originContent: ### Categories
translatedContent: ### Categorías

originContent: SponsorBlock is capable of skipping more than just sponsor segments.
translatedContent: SponsorBlock es capaz de saltar más que solo segmentos patrocinados.

originContent: You can adjust which segments you want to be skipped in the "Categories" section of the settings.
translatedContent: Puedes ajustar qué segmentos quieres que se salten en la sección "Categorías" de la configuración.

originContent: The default setting is to only skip sponsor segments.
translatedContent: La configuración predeterminada es saltar solo los segmentos patrocinados.

originContent: ### Importing your account
translatedContent: ### Importar tu cuenta

originContent: If you're already using SponsorBlock you might want to use your existing account (user id).
translatedContent: Si ya usas SponsorBlock quizás quieras usar tu cuenta existente (id de usuario).

originContent: To do this refer to the [Import an existing account](https://github.com/siku2/script.service.sponsorblock/wiki/Import-an-existing-account) wiki page.
translatedContent: Para ello consulta la página wiki de [Importar una cuenta existente](https://github.com/siku2/script.service.sponsorblock/wiki/Import-an-existing-account).

originContent: ## Helping out
translatedContent: ## Colaborar

originContent: You can help translate the addon to different languages.
translatedContent: Puedes ayudar a traducir el complemento a diferentes idiomas.

originContent: Localisation is done using [GitLocalize](https://gitlocalize.com/).
translatedContent: La localización se realiza utilizando [GitLocalize](https://gitlocalize.com/).

originContent: You can start translating [here](https://gitlocalize.com/repo/4205) (you can sign-in using your GitHub account).
translatedContent: Puedes comenzar a traducir [aquí](https://gitlocalize.com/repo/4205) (puedes iniciar sesión con tu cuenta de GitHub).

originContent: If there's a language missing please don't hesitate to ask for it to be added by opening a new issue.
translatedContent: Si falta algún idioma, no dudes en pedir que se añada abriendo un nuevo issue.

originContent: ## Issues and Suggestions
translatedContent: ## Issues y Sugerencias

originContent: Feel free to [open a new issue](https://github.com/siku2/script.service.sponsorblock/issues/new) if you've encountered an issue or if you have a suggestion.
translatedContent: No dudes en [abrir un nuevo issue](https://github.com/siku2/script.service.sponsorblock/issues/new) si has encontrado un problema o si tienes una sugerencia.

originContent: Bonus points if you [provide the debug logs](https://kodi.wiki/view/Log_file/Easy).
translatedContent: Puntos extra si [proporcionas los registros de depuración](https://kodi.wiki/view/Log_file/Easy).
